d: Chippy calls in two of his hamster friends into battle and stands on their shoulders to deal [[300%]]<ATK> damage to the enemy.
Chippy jumps to deal [[240%]]<ATK> damage to the enemy.
Chippy's normal attacks have a [[2%]] chance to deal [[1000%]]<ATK> damage. These attacks cannot deal critical damage and can only be triggered [[1]] time per battle.
